danger_signals.visual_form: Colored energy blasts matching boss weapon type
danger_signals.meaning: Incoming attack; boss is actively hostile
Boss temporarily immune to damage; timing window closed

danger_signals.visual_form: X's suit visibly cracked or depleted segments on HUD
danger_signals.meaning: Health critical; one hit away from defeat

danger_signals.visual_form: Environmental obstacles matching stage theme (lava, water currents, falling blocks)
danger_signals.meaning: Stage-specific danger; requires themed weapon or adaptation

safety_signals.visual_form: Tank icon on HUD; glowing capsule object in stage
safety_signals.meaning: Health recovery opportunity; safe moment to collect

safety_signals.visual_form: Glowing capsule containers, often in isolated alcoves
safety_signals.meaning: Protective enhancement available; temporary invulnerability upon collection

safety_signals.visual_form: Colored energy orb ejected from boss corpse
safety_signals.meaning: New weapon acquired; damage type advantage established for next stage

safety_signals.visual_form: Absence of enemies; open safe corridor

safety_signals.meaning: Combat phase complete; safe to approach weapon

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: X insignia on chest armor; military police organization
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Maverick Hunters appear as corrupted blue-armored enemies under Sigma control
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Military base structures; Maverick Hunter command centers as safe zones in narrative

faction_indicators.color_identity: Red, purple, dark variants of reploid colors
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Sigma crest; eight Maverick boss signatures (each stage represents a renegade Reploid)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Each boss stage contains Sigma-loyal enemies in corrupted/aggressive forms; red energy auras on hostile reploids
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Corrupted industrial zones; Sigma's stronghold dominance shown through stage environments (Flame Mammoth's refinery = Sigma control of industry, etc.)

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Light capsules; X as Light's creation
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Light's research facility ruins; capsule systems representing Light's final safeguards against Maverick threat

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Zero (Wily's final creation) as symbol; Wily's virus/corruption legacy
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Zero appears as ambiguous ally/rival with Wily's dark aesthetic

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Not directly shown; implied through safe city infrastructure, functioning Reploid society
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Reploids coexist peacefully before Sigma's uprising

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Stages show industrial zones under siege; corrupted Reploid bosses in thematic environments (Fire stage = burning refinery, Ice stage = frozen facility); red alert color schemes in boss arenas
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Eight Maverick bosses actively control territories; Maverick Hunters (including X) deployed to retake zones; civilian absence from stages implies evacuation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Stage transitions to victory state; weapon obtained glows with victory fanfare animation; next stage unlocked visually on stage select
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player gains new weapon capability; stage hazards no longer present; next Maverick revealed as threat

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Final stages show Sigma's fortress as dark, imposing structure; corrupted energy auras intensify; Sigma's chamber features apocalyptic aesthetic (genocide threat materialization)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Sigma fights with escalating power; Zero appears as final ally; world destruction imminent if Sigma succeeds

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: X's suit visibly changes when armor parts equipped; weapon wheel shows expanded options; colored energy blasts match selected weapon
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: X gains mobility options (dash, wall climb); damage output increases; stage secrets become accessible with right weapon combination

environmental_storytelling.example: Flame Mammoth's stage = burning industrial refinery (shows Sigma weaponized infrastructure); Sting Chameleon's stage = camouflage/deception environment (reflects boss nature); Spark Mandrill's stage = power plant (shows control of energy resources)
Stages progress from functioning facilities to corrupted/destroyed versions under Maverick control; collapsed bridges, shattered structures, hazardous environments indicate ongoing siege state
Higher enemy concentration in Maverick-controlled areas; safe corridors indicate human evacuation; boss chamber isolation suggests siege mentality
Early stages use neutral industrial colors; later stages shift toward red/purple (Sigma influence intensifies); final Sigma stage uses apocalyptic blacks and dark reds
Correct weapon vs. boss shows large sprite knockback, bright hit effects; wrong weapon shows minimal visual impact, suggesting tactical disadvantage
Location of healing/upgrade items in hidden alcoves implies desperate survival situations; capsules in high-difficulty areas show Light's foresight in seeding defenses

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Sprite size may appear smaller or more vulnerable-looking visually; movement speed unchanged but tactical urgency increases
Enters arena with dramatic entrance; moves to center stage; weapon charges visible before attack patterns begin
Larger knockback sprite displacement; rapid flickering increases in intensity; visible damage accumulation suggests phase change approaching
Sprite flashes rapidly; attack frequency increases as desperation sets in; final attack animation triggers before weapon drop
Appears in scripted moments with blue energy effects; fights alongside X against shared enemies; visual reliability marker for player
Enters dialogue with Sigma; darkens visually in shadow; signals potential corruption threat to player
Appears in humanoid Reploid form; calm, commanding animations; controlled energy attacks suggest tactical superiority
Sprite distorts; dark energy erupts; transforms into monstrous final form; visual escalation signals final phase desperation
Static or predictable looping movement patterns; visual consistency aids player prediction
Movement becomes erratic; attack animations trigger; color flashes indicate aggression state change

notes: Mega Man X uses clear visual hierarchies to communicate threat levels: boss stages isolate threats and present them as powerful individuals (one-on-one combat), stage environments reinforce faction control through thematic design, and armor/weapon acquisition creates visual progression that maps to mechanical progression. The game's color palette shifts from cool industrial tones to warm danger tones as player approaches Sigma's domain. Flickering animations serve dual function: visual feedback for gameplay state (invincibility, damage) and dramatic tension marker. Stage order flexibility (choose 8 stages) is communicated through stage select screen visual design, allowing player agency in approach sequence.
